top_claims.claim: Cash moved -39.7% versus the prior period (2,426,155.0 to 1,463,442.0).
Net income moved -34.7% versus the prior period (501,078.0 to 327,334.0).
Net income growth moved from +375.6% to +65.6% YoY in the latest quarter. Trailing-twelve-month growth does not yet confirm. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.

Wynn Resorts operates five luxury integrated resorts (two in Macau, two in Las Vegas, one in Boston) plus a 40% stake in a UAE property opening in 2027. FY2025 operating revenues were $7.14 billion; operating cash flow $1.35 billion; owner cash after capital spending about $6.65 per share on 104.2 million diluted share

risk_claims.claim: Cash moved -39.7% versus the prior period (2,426,155.0 to 1,463,442.0).
Net income moved -34.7% versus the prior period (501,078.0 to 327,334.0).
*Primary risk: Refinancing and covenant stress on $10.5 billion of long-term debt if Macau volumes stall or interest rates rise on floating-rate tranches.
